sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n110055" key="fagh/sia" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φαγ-ήσια</orth> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἱερά</foreign>), <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen>, <sense id="n110055.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">an eating-festival,</tr_> and <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φᾰγησῐπόσια</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">an eating and drinking festival,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1270.tlg001:62" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Clearch.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">62</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
